volume.benchmark: Shipment growth vs peer component suppliers
volume.rationale: Base case assumes demand recovery with no full inventory snapback

price.benchmark: Realized ASP from company disclosures and mix trend
price.rationale: Small mix-led improvement offsets normal pricing pressure

gross_margin.rationale: Company tracks toward high end on utilization and mix, but not above the best peer

users.benchmark: Installed base conversion and retention metrics
users.rationale: Attach rate expands as new hardware cohorts renew service plans

arpu.benchmark: Peer subscription pricing and company package mix
arpu.rationale: ARPU inches up on premium plan mix, not from broad price hikes

gross_margin.rationale: Scale and retention improve contribution margin gradually

sga_ratio.benchmark: Historical SG&A ratio and peer opex discipline
sga_ratio.rationale: Sales support grows slower than revenue once channel staffing normalizes

rnd_ratio.benchmark: Management roadmap and prior innovation intensity
rnd_ratio.rationale: R&D stays elevated to support product refreshes

other_opex_ratio.rationale: No material step-up expected beyond inflation

non_operating.benchmark: Interest income and other non-op items

tax_rate.rationale: Uses midpoint because there is no major jurisdiction mix shift

diluted_shares.benchmark: Latest diluted share count plus minor SBC dilution
diluted_shares.rationale: Share count increases modestly through the forecast

benchmarks.note: Base case moves from 30.8% to 31.8% on utilization recovery
Base case remains near low end due to limited broad-based repricing
